# rev's Hyprland Dots

A minimal, custom Hyprland rice forked from [end-4/dots-hyprland](https://github.com/end-4/dots-hyprland) and stripped down.

**Stack:** Hyprland · Quickshell (QML) · Kitty · Fish · Matugen · Rofi · swww · cliphist

## Install

```bash
git clone https://github.com/revanthlol/dots-hyprland
cd dots-hyprland
./setup install
```

## Uninstall

```bash
./setup uninstall
```

## Credits

- [end-4/dots-hyprland](https://github.com/end-4/dots-hyprland) — base config and Quickshell components
